themes.label: Salvation
themes.summary: This chapter speaks of rescue, deliverance, redemption, life, or being saved. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And they said, An Egyptian delivered us out of the hand of the shepherds, and also drew water...". Word-study detail reinforces "הִצִּילָ֖נוּ: delivered - to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense".
